heading_font.usage: H1, H2, H3, Hero text, and large callouts. Provides a timeless, crafted architectural feel.

body_font.usage: Body text, paragraphs, labels, small UI elements. Ensures maximum readability.

scales.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-bold tracking-tight leading-none

layout_spacing.container: max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 sm:px-8 md:px-12 lg:px-16

navbar.style: Fixed top, backdrop-blur-xl bg-glass border-b border-glass
navbar.logo: Geometric SVG mark (abstract sharp lines forming an 'N' or a minimalist geometric shape, NO text logo), fill-primary (#00c9a7)
navbar.links: DM Sans text-sm font-medium hover:text-primary transition-colors
navbar.mobile: Hamburger menu, full-screen overlay when open
navbar.active_state: Text color changes to primary, small glowing dot below the active link

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-inverse px-6 py-3 rounded-full font-medium hover:bg-primary_hover transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,201,167,0.4)]
buttons.secondary: border border-border text-primary px-6 py-3 rounded-full font-medium hover:border-primary hover:text-primary_hover transition-all duration-300

cards.default: bg-surface border border-border rounded-2xl p-6 md:p-8 hover:border-glass hover:bg-surface_elevated transition-all duration-300
cards.hover_effect: Hover lift (-translate-y-2) and subtle primary glow box-shadow

badges.default: px-3 py-1 bg-surface_elevated border border-border rounded-full text-sm text-secondary

cursor.style: Small dot (w-3 h-3) bg-primary rounded-full fixed pointer-events-none mix-blend-screen z-[100]
cursor.follower: Larger hollow circle (w-8 h-8) border border-primary rounded-full fixed pointer-events-none transition-transform duration-100

loading_screen.style: Full screen bg-main flex items-center justify-center z-[999]
loading_screen.animation: Geometric SVG logo drawing effect or minimal pulsing teal dot

progress_bar.style: Fixed top-0 left-0 h-1 bg-primary z-[60] origin-left

hero.layout: min-h-screen flex flex-col justify-center items-center relative overflow-hidden
hero.visuals: Particle/grain background (React TSParticles or GSAP canvas), central focal point is Name, profile photo inside a cinematic dark frame, scroll indicator at bottom
hero.typography: Name in H1 Syne, typewriter effect for tagline below name

about.layout: Split layout (1fr 1fr), text on one side, photo on the other
about.visuals: Photo uses rounded-3xl with subtle teal rim glow shadow

skills.content: Categorized badges (Frontend, Backend, Tools) staggered reveal on scroll

experience.layout: Vertical timeline with glowing nodes. Left side date, right side content. Hide entirely if data array is empty.

certificates.layout: Grid (1fr md:1fr 1fr), Cards with hover lift + teal glow
certificates.content: PDF link button pointing to public/ credentialUrl

contact.layout: Centered clean layout with email CTA and social links

animations.hero_reveal: GSAP timeline: text split reveal, fade in particle background, stagger fade up photo
animations.scroll_trigger: Framer Motion 'whileInView' with 'viewport={{ once: true, margin: -100px }}'
animations.hover_micro: CSS transitions + Framer Motion scale tweaks
animations.accessibility: Check prefers-reduced-motion media query to disable heavy GSAP/Framer animations

media.profile_photo_placeholder: /placeholder-profile.jpg (Note: User will upload specific UB almamater photo with teal/blue tone)
media.svg_mark_instructions: Create a custom geometric SVG (e.g., using <polygon> or <path>) representing an abstract N or a cube, filling with #00c9a7

testing.instructions: Ensure all interactive elements (links, buttons, form inputs) contain a 'data-testid' attribute in kebab-case.
